gitCommit.subject: perf: revoke webhook locks SECDEF + update linter baseline (#1675)
gitCommit.body:
perf: revoke webhook locks SECDEF + update linter baseline (#1675)

* perf: add migration secdef_revoke_webhook_locks

Revoga EXECUTE de claim_webhook_delivery, release_webhook_delivery_lock
e cleanup_stale_webhook_locks das roles PUBLIC/anon/authenticated.
Funções são edge-only (service_role). Fecha 57 WARN do supabase-linter.

* perf: update linter baseline — add restore_seller_cart

restore_seller_cart é RPC pública do frontend (useSellerCarts.ts:325).
RLS interna à função filtra por auth.uid(). SECURITY DEFINER necessário
para bypass de RLS controlado no INSERT do cart+items. Baseline: 49 → 50.
